title: LEGO Christmas Table Decoration - Building Toy incl. a Candle, Red Berries, Golden Stars and Foliage for Festive Decor - Fun Family Activity - Gift for 12+ Year Old Girls, Boys & Teens - 40743
features: LEGO CHRISTMAS DECORATION – Encourage creativity this festive season with the LEGO Christmas Table Decoration building toy for 12+ year old boys, girls and teens
FESTIVE JOY – Features a red candle at the centre, surrounded by red berries, golden stars and green foliage to create colourful Christmas decor
BUILD TOGETHER – A fun family activity for the holiday season, this LEGO arts and crafts set brings everyone together for a creative build
CHRISTMAS TABLE DECORATION – Once built, display the centrepiece on the table during festive feasts and gatherings
GIFT IDEA FOR KIDS AND TEENS – Makes a fun festive gift for 12+ year old girls, boys and teenagers who love LEGO building toys and creative arts and crafts kits
LEGO HOLIDAY COLLECTION – Expand your holiday decor with more festive LEGO building sets for even more seasonal creativity (sold separately)
description: From the manufacturer An eye-catching Christmas centrepiece Encourage kids to get creative this festive season and build a gorgeous LEGO table decoration that can be treasured forever. Enjoy a creative Christmas project Christmas lovers will have fun creating the centrepiece and discovering its charming festive details. LEGO Christmas Table Decoration Red candle A red candle sits at the centre of the decoration. Festive colours Discover the golden stars and green foliage. Christmas decor Display the centrepiece proudly as Christmas decor. Make holiday memories Kids can enjoy this build solo or share it with friends and family to bond over bricks this festive season. Discover more festive magic Expand your LEGO Christmas decor collection with other holiday building sets (sold separately) for Christmas fans of all ages.
